title.en: Sterilization of medical devices - Requirements for medical devices to be designated 'STERILE' - Part 1: Requirements for terminally sterilized medical devices

scope.en: Requirements for terminally sterilized device labelling

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for terminally sterilized medical devices to be labelled 'STERILE'. Establishes a maximum theoretical probability of a non-sterile unit.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products — Microbiological methods — Part 1: Determination of a population of microorganisms on products

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for determining the population of viable microorganisms on or in a medical device, component, raw material or package.

title.en: Sterilization of health-care products — Ethylene oxide — Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of an ethylene oxide sterilization process for medical devices.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Biological indicators - Part 1: General requirements

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements and test methods for biological indicators used in sterilization validation.
standards.scope: Sterilization of health care products -- Biological indicators -- General requirements.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Biological indicators - Part 2: Biological indicators for ethylene oxide sterilization processes

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for biological indicators intended to assess the performance of ethylene oxide sterilization processes.
standards.scope: Sterilization of health care products -- Biological indicators -- Biological indicators for ethylene oxide sterilization processes.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Vocabulary of terms used in sterilization and related equipment and process standards

standards.abstract: Defines vocabulary and terms used in sterilization and related procedures for healthcare products.
standards.scope: Sterilization of health care products -- Vocabulary of terms used in sterilization and related equipment and process standards.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Moist heat - Part 1: Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of moist heat sterilization processes.
standards.scope: Sterilization of health care products -- Moist heat -- Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices (European adopted version).

title.en: Sterilization of health-care products - Ethylene oxide - Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices

standards.scope: Ethylene oxide sterilization of medical devices.
standards.abstract: Requirements for EO sterilization process development, validation and routine control.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Radiation - Part 1: Requirements for development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices
Sterilization of health care products - Radiation - Part 2: Establishing the sterilization dose

standards.abstract: Methods for establishing the sterilization dose for radiation sterilization.

title.en: Sterilization of health care products - Moist heat - Part 1: Requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a sterilization process for medical devices

standards.scope: Moist heat sterilization of medical devices.
standards.abstract: Requirements for moist heat (steam) sterilization process.
